form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Affaire De Cover at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 56 on March 3 at $17. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Cee Cee In Paris at this track over 1609m in a 3yo No NR on March 17 at $5. Leaning to others.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Cee Cee In Paris, a rival who he faces again; when 155 metres sixth at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR race on March 20. Unlikely to threaten.

Broke shortly after the start and trailed the field thereafter.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th (10m Fr2) over 2300m at this track well beaten by Valley Star (2:53.30) in No NR on March 10 at $51. Before that 6th (Fr4) over 2300m at this track beaten 55 m by Deep Love (2:50.80) in 3-2yo 3yo 2 WINsAlso eligible NR54 on February 24 at $5. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Bathurst on March 28. At the run before good run when 2nd (Fr4) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 30 m by Cee Cee In Paris (2:06.80) in 3yo No NR on March 20 at $14. Forward performance expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Became unbalanced and galloped after the start.
Weakened inside the final 600m to be beaten 63.8m.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign recording a big 5 m win as favourite (FT Fr1) at Albion Park (2:42.10) beating Nonis Gold Class in 2yo No NR on November 21 at $2.40 at the bell was leading 4.2m on the pegs. Sure to be in the mix while fresh.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation when a close second after showing early speed, behind Adelaide Red at Melton over 2240m in a 2yo G1 No NR F on December 13 at $13. Likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation when a close second after showing early speed, behind Adelaide Red at Melton over 2240m in a 2yo G1 No NR F on December 13 at $13. Likely to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke approaching the first turn.
Shifted out whilst under pressure inside the final 200m.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Sr2) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 30 m by Notanotha Naughty (2:06.40) in 3yo LR No NR on March 28 at $4.20. Showed ability the race before when she won by 30 m when quickly away, (Fr5) at Bathurst (2:06.80) beating What The Tooth in 3yo No NR on March 20 at $4.40 at the bell was leading 4.5. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out in the second score up. Broke after the start and trailed the field.
Hung out from the first turn until passing the 500m.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Im Havintotrot at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR on March 20 at $2.25. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing second behind Notanotha Naughty at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo LR No NR on March 28 at $6.50. Sure to be there at the business end.
